title: Apex Group suports launch of tokenised real estate fund
snippet: Apex Group Ltd ("Apex Group"), a global financial services provider with over $3.5 trillion in assets serviced, today announced its role in the launch of a blockchain-native real estate fund developed in collaboration with Archax, Goldman Sachs, LRC Group, and Ownera.

title: JPMorgan, Citi-backed consortium plans to launch tokenized deposit network in early 2027: WSJ
snippet: The initiative would enable tokenized deposits to move instantly and support around-the-clock settlement, the Wall Street Journal reported.

title: Triple-A puts multicurrency account on stablecoin rails
snippet: Today, Triple-A, a licensed global payment institution, announces the launch of the European rollout of stablecoin-enabled Multicurrency Accounts, giving global businesses access to local banking collection rails without the need to set up a local entity.

title: Big Banks Launch Tokenized Deposit Network to Fight Off Stablecoin Threat
snippet: The largest U.S. banks are building their own blockchain payment network, a direct response to crypto firms that are pushing deeper into core banking territory under a crypto-friendly Trump administration. title: Coinbase to launch token-backed mortgage down payments this summer
snippet: A Coinbase-Better Home & Finance initiative will allow qualified borrowers to use Bitcoin and USDC as collateral for home loan down payments.
